---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: page-header
# Projects
:::

A mix of research tools, open-source work, and things built along the way. Some are polished and live; others are works in progress.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: project-grid

::: project-card
[Live]{.project-status .status-live}

### Academic Website Template

An open-source Quarto template for building a professional academic website — free, no coding experience required, and deployable to GitHub Pages in under an hour. This site was built with it.

::: project-tags
[Quarto]{.project-tag} [GitHub Pages]{.project-tag} [CSS]{.project-tag} [Open source]{.project-tag}
:::

::: project-links
[View template](https://connorconkeymorrison.com/pages/template){.project-link}
[GitHub](https://github.com/ccicm/academic-website-template){.project-link-secondary}
:::
:::

::: project-card
[In progress]{.project-status .status-wip}

### Systematic Review Data Pipeline

A Google Colab notebook pipeline for developing, pulling, and testing search strings in PubMed data. Built to support [Paper 1](research.qmd) of my PhD.

::: project-tags
[Python]{.project-tag} [Google Colab]{.project-tag} [Sys review]{.project-tag} 
:::

::: project-links
[View on Colab]{.project-link}
:::
:::

::: project-card
[Planned]{.project-status .status-planned}

### EBSA Intervention Evidence Map

An interactive evidence map for the systematic review of emotionally based school avoidance interventions (Paper 1). Planned as a living document updated alongside the review.

::: project-tags
[R]{.project-tag} [Systematic review]{.project-tag} [EBSA]{.project-tag} [Visualisation]{.project-tag}
:::
:::

::: project-card
[Planned]{.project-status .status-planned}

### Psychology Stats Reference

A quick-reference guide for common statistical procedures in psychology research — aimed at honours and postgraduate students. Covering assumption testing, effect sizes, and reporting conventions in APA style.

::: project-tags
[Jamovi]{.project-tag} [R]{.project-tag} [Statistics]{.project-tag} [Teaching]{.project-tag} 
:::
:::

:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: about-section
Have a question about any of these, or interested in collaborating? [Get in touch →](contact.qmd)
:::
